1129.reason: [Error: The error line number should correspond to the line of the last non-terminal before the semicolon, but 'first.my_line_num()' may not represent the correct location. According to specification, it should be the line where the last token before the expected semicolon appears.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The error line number should correspond to the line of the last non-terminal before the semicolon, but 'first.my_line_num()' may not represent the correct location. According to specification, it should be the line where the last token before the expected semicolon appears.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error 'i' should use the line number of the last parsed element before the missing semicolon, but 'first.my_line_num()' may not represent the correct location. According to spec, it should be the line of the last non-terminal before the semicolon, which should be derived from the most recently parsed token (likely 'first' or the last VarDef), but the current implementation may not correctly capture this in all cases.]
